entries.name: PlayersCommandMaximumConstant
entries.notes: Initializes r12d with the /players command maximum immediately before the vanilla clamp at 0x188860. BKVince sets it to the verified-safe ceiling of 14 and leaves the clamp intact.

entries.name: GetItemBaseDurability
entries.notes: Native base-durability path hooked by DurabilityResistance.

entries.name: STATLIST_UnitGetStatValue
entries.notes: Unit-level (unit, statId, layer) wrapper with 91 direct callers. It packs the key as (statId << 16) | layer, resolves ItemStatCost, then calls the full-stat lookup at 0x2F9B10. EnhancedDamageMinMaxFix 1.0.0 hooked this wrapper unsuccessfully.

entries.name: STATLIST_EvaluateStatOperations
entries.notes: Recursive ItemStatCost operation evaluator. Its 14-entry switch maps operation 13 to 0x2F9709, where an item-owned stat is combined with the configured op-stat value as a percentage.

entries.name: STATLIST_GetBaseStatValue
entries.notes: Reads the packed stat from the base Stats array at stat-list offset 0x30 and applies the ItemStatCost minimum clamp.

entries.name: STATLIST_GetTotalStatValue
entries.notes: Reads the packed stat from FullStats at offset 0xA8 for an extended list, or from base Stats at offset 0x30 otherwise. It is a lookup, not the recursive ItemStatCost evaluator. EnhancedDamageMinMaxFix 1.1.0 hooked this function unsuccessfully and also decoded the packed stat in reverse.

entries.name: STATLIST_UpdateUnitStat
entries.notes: Updates a computed FullStats entry and runs the native unit/callback propagation path. ABI proven from calls at 0x2FA476, 0x2FA4B1 and 0x2FA7DD: (statList, packedStat, value, itemStatCost, callbackUnit).

entries.name: STATLIST_EvaluateAndUpdateStat
entries.notes: Evaluates a packed stat through 0x2F8AD0, recursively refreshes dependent op stats, and normally commits through 0x2F9DB0. Its operation switch at 0x2FA697 maps op=13 to 0x2FA8C7, which suppresses the commit when statList ownerType at +0x08 is UNIT_ITEM (4). EnhancedDamageMinMaxFix 1.2.0 hooks this routine and restores only the suppressed stats 17/18 update for effective nonweapon items; external in-game validation passed for melee and throwable weapon damage on 2026-07-20.

entries.name: GetDataTablesForContext
entries.notes: Returns the active compiled data-table container for the classic or expansion context. NoEtherealItemTypes uses it to resolve configured codes against the runtime itemtypes records.

entries.name: GetItemsTxtRecord
entries.notes: Returns a 0x1C0-byte compiled items record for a data context and class ID. DurabilityResistance 1.1.0 conditionally clears nodurability at +0x122 for bow/xbow families before the caller reads the record.

entries.name: GetItemDataContext
entries.notes: Returns the data-table context byte for an item unit immediately before item-record and item-type lookups.

entries.name: UNITS_GetUnitType
entries.notes: Returns the unit type used throughout the 92777 stat paths (0 player, 1 monster, 4 item). EnhancedDamageMinMaxFix limits inventory correction to players and monsters.

entries.name: ITEMS_CheckItemTypeId
entries.notes: Checks an item against an itemtypes row through D2R's compiled equivalence LUT. The plugin filters only the two ethereal-generation callers.

entries.name: ServerPlayerDifficultyMaximumCompare
entries.notes: Server-side ceiling comparison in the setter that writes the shared player-difficulty global. BKVince raises the immediate from 8 to 14 while retaining the vanilla conditional move.

entries.name: DAMAGE_LogResolvedType
entries.notes: Per-damage-type observer called by SUNITDMG_ApplyResistancesAndAbsorb after resistance and flat reduction are resolved. The 3.2 caller at 0x452651 passes game, attacker, defender, base damage, resistance, reduction, final damage, type name, damage structure, and the table flag. FloatingDamage hooks its build-unique strict 26-byte prologue without modifying any argument or result.

entries.name: D2GAME_SKILLMANA_Consume
entries.notes: Native mana and charged-item consumption path used by the official plugin pack.

entries.name: WeaponQuantityDelta
entries.notes: Separate projectile-consumption path for weapon/arrow/bolt/throwable quantity; it is not the melee durability rollover handled by ApplyDurabilityLoss.

entries.name: ApplyDurabilityLoss
entries.notes: Native durability-loss routine; 4 percent weapon and 10 percent armor thresholds. Throwing weapons used in melee enter this routine, and depleted internal durability can roll over into a one-point stack reduction.

entries.name: ForceMagicPrefixSite
entries.notes: Validated 3.2 equivalent of the legacy force-magic-prefix edit.

entries.name: ForceMagicSuffixSite
entries.notes: Validated 3.2 equivalent of the legacy force-magic-suffix edit.

entries.name: EtherealWeaponTypeGateCall
entries.notes: First ethereal eligibility type check: ITEMS_CheckItemTypeId(item, ITEMTYPE_WEAPON), returning to 0x4432DA.

entries.name: EtherealArmorTypeGateCall
entries.notes: Fallback ethereal eligibility type check: ITEMS_CheckItemTypeId(item, ITEMTYPE_ANY_ARMOR), returning to 0x4432E9.

entries.name: SUNITDMG_ApplyResistancesAndAbsorb
entries.notes: D2R 3.2 equivalent proven from the unique 12-entry damage-stat loop at 0x44EC44, matching damage offsets, resistance/pierce/absorb flow, fixed-point percentage branches, and the post-resolution observer call at 0x452651.

entries.name: SynchronizeItemAndBoundSkillQuantity
entries.notes: Central routine reached by the Book path; updates STAT_QUANTITY and the bound scroll/book skill.

entries.name: RejectedJavelinQuantityCandidate
entries.notes: Explicit Javelin item-type path (0x29), not the tome path.

entries.name: RejectedBookQuantityCandidate
entries.notes: Rejected candidate retained vanilla for regression checks.

entries.name: GAME_GetPlayerCountBonus
entries.notes: Computes per-monster player-count bonuses. BKVince hooks it with strict expected bytes to cap monster HP scaling independently at players 8 while the safe requested difficulty ceiling is 14.

entries.name: BookQuantityDeltaBeforeSynchronization
entries.notes: Loads -1 into r9d after the Book type check and before the central quantity synchronization call.
